_comment: Odoo 13 differentiation from odoo-12 base: dropped @api.one (use @api.depends/iterate self), Python 3.6 baseline. Architecture otherwise close to v12 — reuses odoo-12 rule pack until a dedicated odoo-13 rule dir exists. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-13/ when v13-specific .mdc content is authored.
description: Odoo 13 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.6+, QWeb + jQuery, recordset-default (no @api.one). Legacy ORM era; reuses odoo-12 rule pack — fork when v13 deltas materialize.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-12 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-13/ is authored. v13 still uses @api.multi-era patterns so odoo-12 rules apply.
